$meta.usedBy: Feature C1 customer upsert — dedup lookup by external_reference

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from previous response.metadata; omit for the first request.

filter.description: URL-encoded JSON array of filter objects: [{field, operator, value}]. Supported filterable fields and their operators: id (lt/lteq/gt/gteq/eq/not_eq/in/not_in), customer_type (eq/not_eq), ledger_account_id (eq/not_eq), name (start_with/eq), external_reference (start_with/eq/not_eq/in/not_in), reg_no (eq/not_eq/in/not_in), emails (in).

sort.description: Field name, prefix with `-` for descending.
